title: philotheca wonganensis
intro: Philotheca wonganensis, also known as the Wongan Philotheca, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly referred to as a small shrub. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its essential oils, particularly the limonene and beta-pinene compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations, reduce stress, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Philotheca wonganensis is often used as an essential oil or in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to harness its potential therapeutic effects.
